---
applyTo: "**/*.tsx,**/*.ts"
description: "Apply React component patterns focused on readability, purity, and maintainability."
---

# React Component Patterns

Apply these rules when implementing components:

- Prefer function components and hooks.
- Keep components pure and side effects isolated.
- Use clear and descriptive names for components, props, and handlers.
- Avoid unnecessary local state when derived values are sufficient.
- Extract subcomponents only when it improves readability or reuse.
- Prefer composition over deeply nested conditional rendering blocks.
